title: Lyrian 32x
description: Futuristic Samurai Themed PvP Texture Pack
body:
Introducing Lyrian 32x, a purple Sci-Fi themed PvP pack for minigames like Skywars, Bedwars, and more. Upgrade your PvP experience with the most futuristic texture pack to exist. Now on JAVA EDITION! 

Now also supporting Mace PvP Arsenal and Spears.
